name: Interactive Portfolio
desc: This website — animated terminal + cinematic scroll with dark/light mode.

name: EcoBase − Ecocène
desc: Web application for managing collaborative projects across multiple associations at a European scale. Handles tasks, permissions, and member management. Built with PHP, JavaScript, HTML and CSS.

name: Writterly
desc: Web application for writing mini-blogs, built entirely with React and Node.js. Includes a SQLite database, JWT authentication, and a fully custom REST API.

name: Job Scraper
desc: Python script using BeautifulSoup, CloudScraper and Selenium to extract job listings from multiple job boards (Indeed, LinkedIn, WTTJ, Hellowork). Results are sent to the user as a formatted HTML email.
